title: Luffy Throws Wapol Away
description: On pages 9–12, luffy throws wapol away as the crew encounters Wapol and his men at sea, giving the first glimpse of the cruelty tied to Drum Kingdom.
scene: Luffy Throws Wapol Away. The crew encounters Wapol and his men at sea, giving the first glimpse of the cruelty tied to Drum Kingdom. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We're in a real hurry, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There can't be only 4 people on this ship...

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Tin can King Pirates Captain »TIN-PLATE Wapol »

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He ate through that knife whole!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: It hurts just look- ing at it!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: We wish to head for drum kingdom.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you happen to have an eternal pose or even a log pose on you?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And we've never even heard of that place before...

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: If you're done asking, hurry up and go away.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Oh there's no need to rush through life like that... well, if you don't have it, then I might as well take all your treasures and your ship instead.

summary: This part centers on luffy throws wapol away, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
